Lines.Speaker: You
Lines.Text: You seem distracted... is something wrong?

Lines.Speaker: Alex
Lines.Text: Lately my life hasn't been going the way I want it to, and I just feel inadequate.

Choices.Text: Everyone feels that way sometimes. Don't be so hard on yourself - I'm here whenever you need someone.
No one's life is perfect. You don't need to be so fragile about it.

Lines.Speaker: Alex
Lines.Text: Thank you. That's exactly what I needed to hear. I'm lucky to have a coworker like you :)
